zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Oakley於1288年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾葛拉芙頓 雷吉時，她的父親Sir Richard Fitzadam17歲，母親Geva De Oakley15歲。她於1288年與Baron John II De Lyons在英國諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 歐克麗結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1323年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 歐克麗享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Oakley于1288年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾葛拉芙頓 雷吉时，她的父亲Sir Richard Fitzadam17岁，母亲Geva De Oakley15岁。她于1288年与Baron John II De Lyons在英国諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 歐克麗结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1323年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 歐克麗享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Oakley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of numerous places called Oakley, Oakle, or Oakleigh, in Bedfordshire, Essex, Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Kent, Somerset, Suffolk, or Wiltshire. The placenames derive from Old English āc ‘oak’ + lēah ‘open woodland’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Oakley was born in 1288, in Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Fitzadam, was 17 and her mother, Geva De Oakley, was 15. She married Baron John II De Lyons in 1288, in Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1323, in Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Oakley est née en 1288, à Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Fitzadam, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Geva De Oakley, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Baron John II De Lyons en 1288, à Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1323, à Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Oakley 1288 in Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Fitzadam 17 und ihre Mutter Geva De Oakley 15. Sie hat 1288 in Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, England Baron John II De Lyons geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1323 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Oakley è nata il nel 1288 nel Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Fitzadam, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Geva De Oakley, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Baron John II De Lyons nel 1288, nel Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Margery Oakleyが1288年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグラフトン レジスで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Fitzadamは17歳，母Geva De Oakleyは15歳であった。1288年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアト オアクリーでBaron John II De Lyonsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1323年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアト オアクリーで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Oakley(이)가 1288년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그라프턴 레지스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Fitzadam(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Geva De Oakley(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1288년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그리트 클리에서 Baron John II De Lyons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 그리트 클리에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Oakley nasceu em 1288, em Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Fitzadam, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Geva De Oakley, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Baron John II De Lyons em 1288, em Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Oakley родилась в 1288 г. в местности графтон регис, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Fitzadam было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Geva De Oakley, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baron John II De Lyons в 1288 г. в местности грит оакли, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1323 г. в местности грит оакли, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.

Se casó con Baron John II De Lyons en 1288, en Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1323, en Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 35 años.
